0.text: Reticulonodular density increases in both lung apices

1.text: Emphysematous changes in both lung apices

2.text: Thin-walled parenchymal air cyst measuring 6.5 mm in diameter in the laterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Several calcific nodules measuring up to 2.2 mm in both lungs

4.text: Largest calcific nodule located in the superior lingular segment of the left upper lobe
